meta.purpose: Small-batch candidate sweep for PL Commentary Bank before any database promotion.
meta.databasePromotionPolicy: Confirmed histories require explicit official/high-trust source support plus identity confidence. Ambiguous identity rows stay in data/research-candidates.json.

batchScope.openPrCheck: Open PR #111 was present but self-described as a report generator only; no athlete candidate/data mutation overlap was identified.
batchScope.writeScope: This isolated batch log only. No data/database.json, CSS, print template, A4 layout, app runtime, or v5.9.6_LOCK changes. data/research-candidates.json update was intentionally deferred to avoid lossy full-file replacement in this connector-backed run.
